name: Caffeine
description: A powerful antioxidant that reduces puffiness and improves circulation.
scientificSummary: Acts as a vasoconstrictor and possesses antioxidant properties that protect skin cells from UV radiation and slow down photoaging.
mechanismOfAction: Constricts blood vessels to reduce swelling and improves microcirculation for a brighter appearance.

seo.title: Caffeine in Skincare - Puffiness & Dark Circles | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how caffeine revitalizes tired skin and reduces under-eye puffiness.
